Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class MyDomainSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MyDomainSettings
public class MyDomainSettings extends Metadata

Java class for MyDomainSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MyDomainSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="canOnlyLoginWithMyDomainUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesApiLoginRequireOrgDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="domainPartition" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}OrgDomainShard" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEdgeDuringRollout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNativeBrowserForAuthOnAndroid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNativeBrowserForAuthOnIos" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableShareBrowserSessionAndroidForAuth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableShareBrowserSessionIOSForAuth" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="logRedirections" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="myDomainName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="myDomainSuffix" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}OrgDomainProdSuffix" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="redirectForceComSiteUrls" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="redirectPriorMyDomain" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="use3rdPartyCookieBlockingCompatibleHostnames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useEdge" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useEnhancedDomainsInSandbox" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useStabilizedMyDomainHostnames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="useStabilizedSandboxMyDomainHostnames" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
